title: Rinorea laxiflora
taxonomy: Rinorea laxiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. This plant is part of the genus Rinorea, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the violet family. The family Violaceae belongs to the order Malpighiales, which is a large and diverse order of flowering plants. The order Malpighiales is part of the clade Rosids, which includes many other flowering plant families.
